_note: Ad templates for Layer 6. Slots are {{construct_name}} and are filled from the player's strongest inferences using a fixed adjective vocab in engine/src/inkling_engine/reveal/targeting.py. Every line passes the lexicon check. Tone is recognizably marketing on purpose — the simulation is supposed to feel like an ad.

templates.body_template: A {{risk_tolerance}} portfolio set up in nine minutes. Cancel anytime.
Plans built around how you actually work, including a {{frustration_tolerance}} reset between blocks.
A daily practice that meets you where you are — {{deliberation}}, twelve minutes, one screen.
Profile prompts that surface how {{attribution_style}} you are with new connections.
Project canvases that scale with you — {{performance_under_load}} layouts that hold the whole picture.
Weekly assignments graded on {{utilitarian_leaning}} outcomes, not seat time.

templates.headline_template: A line of credit that respects {{risk_tolerance}} budgeting.
templates.body_template: Auto-pay rules tuned for {{stress_response}} months, with a soft cap you set in two taps.
Curated weekly, {{adaptation_rate}} to what you actually use.
